description: The paris hilton for men is is masculine and sophisticated. The top notes are blend of fig leaf, green mango. The middle notes include white sage, juniper and basil. Base notes sign off with cedar-wood, cucumber and amber. Paris Hilton for men is recommended for daytime wear. Quantity: 50 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
